name: flatbuffers-crypto-wallet-demo
description: Browser demo for FlatBuffers WASM crypto capabilities

scripts.build: vite build && cp streaming-dispatcher.js streaming-dispatcher.wasm dist/
scripts.check:links: node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs index.html . && node scripts/check-doc-links.mjs ../../docs/index.html ../../docs && node scripts/check-landing-docs.mjs . && node scripts/check-landing-docs.mjs ../../docs && node scripts/check-sdn-stack-nav.mjs flatbuffers index.html ../../docs/index.html
